center.name: California mixed evergreen forest
center.summary: California mixed evergreen forest是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括西丛鸦，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: True to its name, the California scrub jay inhabits areas of low scrub, preferring pinyon-juniper forests, oak woods, and edges of mixed evergreen forests
